description: A list of live chat message resources for a given broadcast.

kind.description: Identifies the API resource's type. Value is youtube#liveChatMessageListResponse.

nextPageToken.description: The token for the next page of results.

pollingIntervalMillis.description: The amount of time the client should wait before polling again, in milliseconds.

offlineAt.description: The date and time when the underlying stream went offline.

pageInfo.description: Paging details for a list of live streaming resources.

totalResults.description: The total number of results in the result set.

resultsPerPage.description: The number of results included in the API response.

items.description: A list of chat messages that match the request criteria.
A liveChatMessage resource represents a chat message in a YouTube live broadcast.

kind.description: Identifies the API resource's type. Value is youtube#liveChatMessage.

id.description: The ID that YouTube assigns to uniquely identify the message.

snippet.description: The snippet object contains basic details about the message.

liveChatId.description: The ID of the live chat to which this message belongs.

displayMessage.description: Contains a string that can be displayed to the user. The string is not necessarily the message text itself.

authorChannelId.description: The ID of the user that authored this message.

publishedAt.description: The date and time when the message was orignally published.

hasDisplayContent.description: Whether the message has display content that should be displayed to users.

textMessageDetails.description: Details about the text message. This object is only present if the type is textMessageEvent.

authorDetails.description: The authorDetails object contains basic details about the user that posted this message.

channelId.description: The YouTube channel ID of the message author.

channelUrl.description: The channel URL of the message author.

isVerified.description: Indicates whether YouTube has verified the authenticity of the channel owner's identity.

isChatOwner.description: Indicates whether the user is the owner of the live chat.

isChatSponsor.description: Indicates whether the user is a sponsor of the live chat.

isChatModerator.description: Indicates whether the user is a moderator of the live chat.

title: LiveChatMessageListResponse
